scripts.mcp-app: uv run fastmcp dev apps mcp/src/server.py:create_server --reload --dev-port 8081 --mcp-port 8101
scripts.format: pnpm exec biome check --write . && uv run ruff format .
scripts.format:check: pnpm exec biome format . && uv run ruff format . --check
scripts.lint: pnpm run lint:ts && pnpm run lint:py
scripts.test: pnpm run test:py && pnpm run test:fe
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:ts && pnpm run typecheck:py
scripts.typecheck:py: uv run mypy -p src && uv run mypy mcp/src mcp/tests
scripts.check: pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck
